metadata.title: GitHub-style activity graph and snapshot switching

intent: GitHub-style activity graph and snapshot switching
outcome: EVE repository activity now renders a GitHub-style contribution calendar with real Evolution intensity, and detail/snapshot views provide a right-rail snapshot timeline for switching between product states.

fixed.description: Repository activity graph shows month labels, weekday anchors, tooltips, and real intensity buckets from Evolution counts.
Evolution detail pages show a snapshot timeline in the implementation rail so users can switch to adjacent product snapshots.
Snapshot pages show the same snapshot timeline and keep behavior/verification sections readable beside it.
